_comment: Plan verifier (server/plan-review.js). A read-only release engineer that must be able to read ANYTHING in the repos to validate a plan — so reads/search are wide open (Read/Glob/Grep + general Bash for find/grep/cat/etc.). It runs headless (claude -p) in a throwaway detached worktree of origin/<base>, so there is no interactive channel to approve permission prompts; we grant broad READ instead. Mutations stay denied: it must never edit, delete, commit, push, or escalate.
